meta.title: Chaos Under Heaven: A Book Talk with Josh Rogin
meta.description:
Join Hudson Institute’s Walter P. Stern Distinguished Fellow Kenneth Weinstein and award-winning Washington Post columnist Josh Rogin for a discussion of Rogin’s new book, “Chaos Under Heaven: Trump, Xi, and the Battle for the 21st Century.”

“Chaos Under Heaven” analyzes the profound transformation of America’s China policy as the Trump administration faced off against Xi Jinping’s increasingly authoritarian and aggressive practices. The book covers key policy challenges including the One Belt, One Road initiative, the Chinese Communist Party’s quest to control information technology through state-owned enterprises such as Huawei and ZTE, and the disastrous handling of the outbreak of COVID-19. Please join Hudson Institute for this timely book discussion.
